title: Stage 3 Exp B: Delta_rz Second-Order Signal

content.hypothesis: Eta can adapt via delta_rz = resp_z(t) - resp_z(t-1) second-order signal
content.result: Training: ALIVE-s3-B (+0.165) vs ALIVE-s2 (+0.168) = -0.003 (tied). Novel signals: ALIVE-s3-B (+0.115) vs ALIVE-s2 (+0.074) = +0.041 (55% improvement). Eta distribution healthy (mean ~0.00056, no clipping, genuine spread)
content.root_cause: N/A (partial success — generalization improves but training does not)
